channel.title: My Blog
channel.description: A blog powered by GitHub Issues

item.title: Code Highlighting Test
item.description:
--- title: Code Highlighting Test date: 2025-01-20 category: Test tags: [code, highlight, test] ---
# Code Highlighting Test
This post tests code block highlighting with multiple languages.
## Python
```python def fibonacci(n: int) -> list[int]: """Generate Fibonacci sequence.""" if n <=

item.title: Mixed Chinese and Special
item.description:
--- title: Mixed Chinese and Special date: 2024-01-22 tags: [test, mixed] category: Test ---
# Mixed Chinese and Special Characters
This file tests URL handling for mixed content.
## Test Cases
- Chinese + English - Parentheses - Spaces
## Expected Result
URL should be properly slugified and s

item.title: Hello World Special Chars
item.description:
--- title: Hello World Special Chars date: 2024-01-21 tags: [test, special-chars] category: Test ---
# Hello World Special Chars
This file tests URL handling for filenames with special characters.
## Test Characters
- Spaces - Exclamation mark (!) - At sign (@) - Hash (#) - Dollar sign ($) - Per

item.title: 中文文件名测试
item.description:
--- title: 中文文件名测试 date: 2024-01-20 tags: [test, 中文] category: Test ---
# 中文文件名测试
这篇文章用于测试中文文件名是否能正确转换为URL安全的slug。
## 测试内容
- 中文标题 - 中文标签 - 特殊字符处理
## 期望结果
URL应该类似：`/zhong-wen-ce-shi/` 或 `/-e4-b8-ad-e6-96-87/`

item.title: Quick Start
item.description:
--- title: "Quick Start" date: 2024-01-16 tags: [setup, tutorial] category: Tutorial pin: 2 description: "Get started with iw-generator in 3 steps" ---
# Quick Start
## 1. Initialize a site
```bash iw init ```
This creates:
``` iw.config.toml content/ index.md ```
## 2. Write content
Create

item.title: Installation
item.description:
--- title: "Installation" date: 2024-01-15 tags: [setup, python] category: Tutorial pin: 1 description: "How to install iw-generator" ---
# Installation
```bash pip install iw-generator ```
## Requirements
- Python >= 3.11

item.title: About
item.description:
--- title: About description: About me and this blog ---
# About Me
This is a personal blog powered by iw-generator.
## What is iw-generator?
iw-generator is a general-purpose Markdown static site generator library that supports:
- **Blog mode**: Full-featured blog with categories, tags, and ar

item.title: Configuration
item.description:
--- title: "Configuration" ---
# Configuration
`iw.config.toml` in the project root:
```toml [site] name = "My Site" url = "https://example.com"
[paths] content = "content" output = "site"
[theme] name = "iw"
[plugins] enable = ["toc", "search"]
[markdown] highlight_theme = "monokai" ```

item.title: Writing Content
item.description:
--- title: "Writing Content" ---
# Writing Content
## Directory Structure
Place `.md` files under `content/`. Nested directories are preserved in output.
``` content/ index.md -> site/index.md getting-started/ quickstart.md -> site/getting-started/quickstart.md ```
##

item.title: iw-generator
item.description:
--- title: "iw-generator" ---
# iw-generator
A general-purpose Markdown static site generator.
## Quick Start
```bash iw init iw build ```
## Features
- TOML config with Pydantic validation - YAML/TOML frontmatter in markdown - Plugin system (entry_points) - Built-in iw theme - Code highlighti

item.title: Plugins
item.description:
--- title: "Plugins" ---
# Plugins
## Built-in
| Plugin | Description | |--------|-------------| | `toc` | Table of contents | | `search` | Client-side search index | | `rss` | RSS feed | | `sitemap` | Sitemap.xml | | `highlight` | Code highlighting |
## Enable
```toml [plugins] enable = ["toc"

item.title: Writing Plugins
item.description:
--- title: "Writing Plugins" ---
# Writing Plugins
Subclass `PluginBase`:
```python from iw_generator.core.plugin import PluginBase
class MyPlugin(PluginBase): name = "my_plugin"
def on_config_loaded(self, config): pass
def on_page_render(self, page, html): return h
